label: Medical imaging & clinical decision support

node.label: Medical imaging & clinical decision support
node.definition: Medical AI supports imaging, documentation, triage, prognosis, and clinical decisions while requiring calibration, privacy, evidence, and human oversight.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
examples: workflows combining Medical imaging & clinical decision support with Multimodal foundation models
workflows combining Medical imaging & clinical decision support with Convolutional neural networks
workflows combining Medical imaging & clinical decision support with Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Multimodal foundation models, Convolutional neural networks.

dependencies.rationale: Medical imaging & clinical decision support integrates Multimodal foundation models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

Medical imaging & clinical decision support integrates Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Medical imaging & clinical decision support integrates Privacy, governance, licensing & audit as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Medical imaging & clinical decision support integrates Linear models & generalized linear models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
